pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + MLP 3.5× + Mixed int5/int6 + SLOT + Brotli — 1.1088 BPB (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Fuses Triton/CUTLASS MLP kernels, expands MLP to 3.5×, and uses Hessian-guided mixed int5/int6 plus Brotli to fit under 16MB.
techniques: Fused Triton TMA forward + CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernels
MLP 3.5× widening with Hessian-based mixed int5/int6 GPTQ allocation
Brotli-11 compression plus SLOT eval-time tuning
